title: Alex Kontorovich on the Absolute Truth of Pure Math
summary: The mathematician Alex Kontorovich speaks with host Steven Strogatz about regaining his creative freedom in an intimidating collaboration and about the pleasures of spherical geometry. The post Alex Kontorovich on the Absolute Truth of Pure Math first appeared on Quanta Magazine
content:
The mathematician Alex Kontorovich speaks with host Steven Strogatz about regaining his creative freedom in an intimidating collaboration and about the pleasures of spherical geometry.

The post Alex Kontorovich on the Absolute Truth of Pure Math first appeared on Quanta Magazine
